home.title: Welcome to NexDoc
home.description: A modern documentation framework built with Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, and MDX. Create beautiful, SEO-friendly docs with full-text search, internationalization, and more.

markdown.title: Markdown/MDX Support
markdown.description: Write your documentation in Markdown or MDX with full support for React components.

search.title: Full-Text Search
search.description: Powerful search functionality powered by FlexSearch for finding content quickly.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Built-in support for multiple languages with next-intl for easy localization.

mdx.title: MDX Components
mdx.description: Rich set of pre-built components including callouts, code blocks with copy buttons, and more.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Static site generation with Next.js 15 for optimal performance and SEO.

seo.title: SEO Optimized
seo.description: Built-in sitemap, robots.txt, and metadata generation for better search rankings.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Create your first documentation site in minutes with our simple setup process.
